chunks.text: ORDER SHEET I N T HE HI G H CO U R T O F S I N DH B E N C H AT S U K K U R Cr. Misc. Appln. No. S – 609 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.5532/2025 (Ex.A) 3. For hearing of main case 20.11.2025 Mr. Ayaz Ahmed Noonari, Advocate for private respondent >>>>>..<<<<< None present for the applicant nor any intimation received. On 13.11.2025, the following order was passed;- “None present for the petitioner, nor any intimation received. Under such circumstances, the matter is liable to be dismissed, however, in the interest of justice, the same is adjourned to 20.11.2025. Let notice of intimation be sent to counsel for the petitioner for the said date of hearing.” The instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application was presented on 01.10.2025; thereafter nobody has turned up to pursue the matter. The deliberate absence on the part of the applicant and his Counsel prima facie indicates that either the purpose of filing instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application has been served or they have lost interest in pursuing the same. Accordingly, the same is dismissed for non- prosecution along with listed application. Judge ARBROHI/PS
